{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe is creating and setting registry keys under 'HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider', which is not a standard Windows component and is often associated with potentially unwanted programs (PUPs) or adware.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "reg_set",
    "VFUProvider",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider"
  ]
}
